enum.name: XR_SPATIAL_COMPONENT_TYPE_BOUNDED_2D_EXT
enum.comment: Component that provides the 2D bounds for a spatial entity. Corresponding list structure is slink:XrSpatialComponentBounded2DListEXT; Corresponding data structure is slink:XrSpatialBounded2DDataEXT

enum.name: XR_SPATIAL_COMPONENT_TYPE_ATTACHABLE_EXT
enum.comment: Component that indicates anchors can be attached to the spatial entity. There is no corresponding list or data structure for this component type. Its presence describes a behaviour of the entity without adding any data.
